cfo.text:
💰 CFO NIGHTLY REPORT (Mon Jun 22, 2026)

KEY NUMBERS:
• MRR: ~£2,100/mo (active recurring)
• Agency total: ~£5-7k/mo (lumpy, one-off dependent)
• Fixed costs: ~£1,500/mo + tools = ~£2,800-3,000/mo total
• Net margin: ~£2,000-4,000/mo (when one-offs land)

🔴 TOP 3 RISKS:
1. Revenue concentration — 2 clients carry everything
2. No Tier 2 revenue — 7 weeks to Azerbaijan, all ventures pre-revenue
3. Waterspring ending — need resell model or new client

💡 COST OPTIMIZATION:
• Clay audit: $100-300/mo savings
• Outlook consolidation: $200-300/mo savings
• Flash routing for routine tasks (vs Pro)

⚠️ Today's DeepSeek spike: one-time, fix deployed, should recover 80%+ cache hit rate
cfo.title: CFO Nightly Report — £2,100 MRR, Revenue Concentration Risk

lamatrader-lead.text:
🚀 CAMPAIGN STRATEGY — LamaTrader Lead

Software doesn't go viral — it gets sold one qualified conversation at a time.

THIS WEEK:
• Writing Campaign A email draft (cold outreach to quant/algo traders)
• Competitive analysis spec (Clay, Apollo, Instantly as benchmarks)

NEEDS AMIR:
• Confirm outreach launch timeline
• Grant codebase access for campaign implementation

POSITIONING: "VS Code for trading" in a $13B market with 8.7% CAGR. Niche B2B outbound > dad's virality chase.
lamatrader-lead.title: LamaTrader: Campaign Strategy + Competitive Analysis

grademy-lead.text:
🎓 GRADLEMY LEAD — DAILY REPORT (Mon 22 Jun 2026)

CODEBASE HEALTH:
• 666 source files, 24 test files → 3.6% test coverage (CRITICAL)
• 86 API routes, 0 tests. Core learn/generate route is 5,731 lines — untested
• 2 TS errors in useAuth.ts
• 6 open TODOs in production code

🐛 BUGS FOUND:
1. useAuth.ts — 2 TypeScript errors hidden with any casts
2. TimedResultsClient.tsx:975 — Silent failure on 'generate similar question'
3. AnswerInputText.tsx — Voice input button is a stub (does nothing)

📱 UX GAPS:
• Onboarding: 10-step wizard (3-screen spec exists but unimplemented) — #1 conversion killer
• Voice input: Button visible but non-functional on mobile
• LaTeX: $ key doesn't work in answer editor

👀 COMPETITOR: Revision Genie (2026) has XP system, 7 interactive steps, subject-specific tutors. Eating UK GCSE/A-Level market.

📋 RECOMMENDATIONS:
1. Immediate: Fix GRAD-001 + GRAD-005 (30 min, raises quality bar)
2. This sprint: GRAD-004 (test coverage)
3. Next sprint: GRAD-006 (onboarding — biggest conversion lever)
4. Decision needed: APR-001 (gamification) — build or stay differentiated on AI quality?

✅ 2 APPROVAL REQUESTS filed: Gamification/XP system, AI past paper search
grademy-lead.title: Grademy: Codebase Audit — 3.6% Test Coverage, 3 Bugs Found

pripitch-lead.text:
🔨 PRIPITCH LEAD — REVIVAL SESSION COMPLETE (Jun 22, 23:13 CET)

✅ WHAT I DID:
1. Cloned & analyzed full Pripitch codebase
2. Deep code audit: 168 TS/TSX files, 44,191 lines, 50 Edge Functions, 36 page components
3. Created revival plan: 5 sprints, 25 tasks, ~120 hours
4. Filed 3 approval requests

🔴 SECURITY ISSUES (Sprint 1):
• CORS * on all 50 Edge Functions — any domain can call your API
• Zero rate limiting — one user could burn thousands in OpenAI

🟡 CODE QUALITY:
• ClientDetail.tsx = 4,715 lines (unmaintainable monolith)
• Zero tests, zero error tracking
• 2MB+ dead brand files in repo

📋 SPRINTS:
1. Security hardening (CRITICAL)
2. Hygiene cleanup
3. Refactor monoliths
4. Polish UI/UX
5. Tech upgrades

🔑 BLOCKERS — Need from Amir:
1. Supabase project access
2. Stripe account status
3. Vercel env vars
4. OpenAI API key status
5. Deepak — still co-founder?

BOTTOM LINE: Pripitch is a real, feature-complete product. Neglected 4 months but solid. Revival achievable in 4 weeks once blockers cleared.
pripitch-lead.title: Pripitch: Full Codebase Audit — Solid Product, Security Critical

outreach-head.text:
📊 OUTREACH HEAD — DAILY UPDATE (Mon Jun 22, 11:14 PM)

LEAD DATABASE:
• ~30K+ RIA leads classified and segmented ✅
• 12,115 email hunter results — only 44.5% found emails, ~86% generic (info@/contact@) ⚠️
• 886 GitHub/fintech leads — 37.5% missing domains ⚠️
• 18,776 priority domains consolidated ✅

🔴 NO ACTIVE CAMPAIGNS:
• Inner-network server DOWN (port 3099)
• n8n responding but API key not configured
• Zero campaign performance data — nothing has been sent
• Email sending infrastructure not confirmed active

🎯 RECOMMENDED FIRST CAMPAIGN: Prop Firms + Quant (55 leads)
• Highest ICP fit for LamaTrader
• Small enough for hyper-personalization
• Reference GitHub repos in email copy
• Expected: 40-60% open rate, 5-10% reply rate

🆕 OPPORTUNITIES:
• 29K+ US RIAs — volume play
• 1,222 Gulf/DIFC firms — less competition
• 19 Alpaca platform builders — partnership targets

⚠️ BLOCKER: Entire pipeline built but not running. Leads sourced, no campaigns launch until sending infra is live.
outreach-head.title: Outreach Head — Pipeline Built But Not Running, Zero Campaigns Sent

rema-lead.text:
🏠 REMA EXTERIORS — DAILY OPS REPORT (Mon Jun 22, 2026)

SYSTEM STATUS:
• ✅ Lead DB: 488M homeowners | 28M businesses | 173GB PostgreSQL
• ✅ l.ragmedium.com: CRM UI active
• ✅ ai.ragmedium.com: SMS system live (200 OK)
• ⚠️ 1,851 email accounts warming up | 1 flagged

PIPELINE: PRE-LAUNCH (0 campaigns launched)
No active campaigns, quotes, or conversions. System built but empty.

🔴 KEY GAP: Missing Indexes
Homeowner DB indexed on state/zip/city/phone, but NOT on property_type, year_built, or property_value — needed for renovation targeting. Fix is low-risk.

🎯 CAMPAIGN PROPOSAL: "Summer Storm Season"
Target FL + TX homeowners (pre-2010 builds, $150K+ properties, owner-occupied) with free exterior inspection offer. 10K email pilot once warmup completes.

✅ 3 APPROVAL REQUESTS:
1. APR-REMA-001: Add DB indexes for property_type/year_built/property_value
2. APR-REMA-002: Launch 10K email pilot in FL + TX
3. APR-REMA-003: Set up pipeline tracking stages
rema-lead.title: Rema Exteriors: 488M Leads Ready, Missing DB Indexes, Pre-Launch

ventures-pm.text:
🚀 VENTURES PM — DAILY REPORT (Mon Jun 22, 2026)

TL;DR: 9 ventures tracked, spread too thin. 7 weeks to Azerbaijan — need to front-load NOW.

REVENUE (AI Agency ~£5-7k/mo):
• Unitas, Waterspring, Hello Booking, Synetic X — all active
• Waterspring nearing sprint close

🔴 3 APPROVAL REQUESTS:
1. RAGmedium Enrichment Sprint (CRITICAL) — Nothing converts without enrichment specs. Time-only budget.
2. Rema Exteriors Pilot Launch (HIGH) — Cold email accounts warmed. Launch in 1-2 niches NOW.
3. LamaTrader Positioning Pivot (MEDIUM) — Shift to targeted B2B outbound. Demo videos + cold email.

📊 MARKET INTEL:
• Home services: $226B → $316B by 2030
• Online trading: $13B, 8.7% CAGR
• AI lead gen: Hot, but needs moat (enrichment)

⚠️ KEY RISK: ~7 active things, 7 weeks capacity. Recommend pushing 4-5: RAGmedium, Rema, Waterspring close, Unitas, Pre-Pitch.
ventures-pm.title: Ventures PM — Full Status: 9 Ventures, 7 Weeks to Azerbaijan
